global.description: The ad features a combination of abstract shapes and text elements promoting an app.

elements.description: Full canvas background of the mobile advertisement.

elements.label: Bottom graphic element
elements.description: A small circular shape located towards the bottom, with a light outline.

elements.label: Exclusive offer text
elements.description: Bold, prominent text stating 'Exclusive tonight Start free today' in a clear, readable font.

elements.label: FluxStream logo
elements.description: The logo 'FluxStream' displayed at the top in a bold, modern font.

elements.label: Install now button
elements.description: A clear, bold button at the bottom with the text 'Install now' in a contrasting color.

elements.label: UGC icon
elements.description: A small icon labeled 'UGC' located at the top left corner, possibly indicating user-generated content.
